title: Stiff Neck Remedies for Musicians: 7 Teas
description: Ginkgo biloba teas have been used for centuries to alleviate stiff neck, and its effectiveness lies in its unique combination of properties and constituents. The tea is rich in flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, which are powerful antioxidants that help reduce inflammation and improve blood flow. This increased blood flow to the neck area helps to relax the muscles, reducing stiffness and pain. Ginkgo biloba also contains terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and anti-spa...
